//: Declared_Object_Check manifest (Req 20). Each entry names a DB object that a spec/task declares as created; scripts/check-declared-objects.mjs verifies every entry exists in the target (preview/CI) schema and fails — naming the object and its declaringTask — if any is missing. Part A/B migration tasks append their entries here as they land (e.g. send_teacher_nudge @ 9.2, mv_historical_evidence @ 12.2, fan_out_announcement_notifications @ 24.2), so DO NOT add those until their tasks create the object — they are intentionally 'red-first'.
//schema: objects[]: { type: 'materialized_view' | 'function' | 'table' | 'view' | 'index', name: string, declaringTask: string, schema?: string (defaults to 'public') }
